Summary: Enthusiastic and dedicated Software Engineer with a solid background in real-time programming, Linux operating systems, and communication protocols. Throughout my career, I've developed a range of solutions—from web applications to real-time systems for communication between microservices and on-premise software.

I honed my skills working as a Software Engineer Consultant at Leonardo in La Spezia, using C, C++, Matlab, and Python. Later, I spent time developing software for 6-DOF Robots (Kawasaki, Fanuc), where I designed a core framework integrating MySql, Halcon, and OPC technologies.

**Currently**, I work at Fincantieri NexTech in the maritime industry. I am heavily focused on the design and development of a C#-based ecosystem of applications dedicated to the automation management of modern ships. Working alongside a talented team of engineers, I am also implementing an advanced SCADA system designed to enable future ships to travel with robust, cybersecurity-aware systems. [GitHub Page](https://giga487.github.io/AmatoSplashPage/)

UniversityProjects.Title: Improving GNSS-Free train localization by integrating odometry with inertial data and track information.
UniversityProjects.Description: In collaboration with Ansaldo-Hitachi and Scuola Superiore Sant’Anna, I’ve studied and developed a method for the GNSS-Free localization of a railway system by analyzing the characteristics of the route and the dynamics of the train. A **railway simulator** with dynamics, control and a set of tools for the analysis of real data have been developed.
